name: Hououmon

signature_move.name: Starlight Explosion
signature_move.description: 12Rains golden grains from its wings that purify evil.Explodes with light.

description: A holy Digimon that possesses four wings that shine gold. It is the head of all Bird Digimon, and is said to be the one that presides over Holy-species Digimon. While Holydramon is the ultimate form of Beast Digimon, Hououmon is the ultimate form of Bird Digimon. As proof that it is a Holy-species Digimon, it draws holy power from where it holds its two " Holy Rings ", and it is understood that the power possessed by Hououmon is unfathomable. Its Special Move is solemnly flapping its four wings, causing it to rain golden grains ( Starlight Explosion ). It is said that those who suffer this technique have all of their wickedness purified.
